samples.text: 根据贝叶斯定理，后验概率等于似然概率乘以先验概率再除以证据概率
贝叶斯定理提供了一种在观察到新证据后更新概率的方法
朴素贝叶斯分类器基于贝叶斯定理和特征条件独立性假设
贝叶斯推断通过贝叶斯定理将先验分布与似然函数结合得到后验分布
在垃圾邮件过滤中，贝叶斯定理用于计算邮件属于垃圾邮件的后验概率
Bayes' theorem states that posterior probability equals likelihood times prior divided by evidence
Bayesian inference combines prior distributions with likelihood functions using Bayes' theorem
Naive Bayes classifiers are based on Bayes' theorem and conditional independence assumptions
Bayes' theorem provides a way to update probabilities after observing new evidence
In spam filtering, Bayes' theorem calculates the posterior probability of an email being spam
概率图模型分为有向图模型和无向图模型两大类
贝叶斯网络是有向图模型，而马尔可夫随机场是无向图模型
概率图模型用图结构表示随机变量之间的依赖关系
混合图模型同时包含有向边和无向边来表示复杂依赖
概率图模型的学习包括结构学习和参数学习两个任务
Probabilistic graphical models are divided into directed and undirected graphical models
Bayesian networks are directed graphical models while Markov random fields are undirected
Graphical models use graph structures to represent dependencies among random variables
Hybrid graphical models contain both directed and undirected edges for complex dependencies
Learning graphical models involves both structure learning and parameter learning tasks
贝叶斯网络使用有向无环图表示变量间的因果关系
贝叶斯网络中的每个节点代表一个随机变量，边表示条件依赖
贝叶斯网络通过局部条件概率表实现联合概率的紧凑表示
在贝叶斯网络中，给定父节点，节点与其非后代节点条件独立
贝叶斯网络可用于医学诊断、故障检测等因果推理场景
Bayesian networks use directed acyclic graphs to represent causal relationships
Each node in a Bayesian network represents a random variable with edges showing conditional dependencies
Bayesian networks provide compact representations of joint distributions via local conditional probability tables
In Bayesian networks, a node is conditionally independent of its non-descendants given its parents
Bayesian networks are used for causal reasoning in medical diagnosis and fault detection
隐马尔可夫模型包含隐藏状态序列和可观测输出序列
HMM的三个基本问题是评估、解码和学习问题
前向算法用于计算隐马尔可夫模型中观测序列的概率
维特比算法用于求解隐马尔可夫模型中的最优状态序列
隐马尔可夫模型广泛应用于语音识别、自然语言处理和时间序列分析
Hidden Markov Models consist of hidden state sequences and observable output sequences
The three fundamental problems of HMMs are evaluation, decoding, and learning
The forward algorithm computes the probability of an observation sequence in HMMs
The Viterbi algorithm finds the optimal state sequence in Hidden Markov Models
HMMs are widely used in speech recognition, NLP, and time series analysis
马尔可夫随机场使用无向图表示变量间的相互作用关系
在马尔可夫随机场中，全局马尔可夫性、局部马尔可夫性和成对马尔可夫性相互等价
马尔可夫随机场通过势函数定义团上的局部概率分布
吉布斯分布是马尔可夫随机场联合概率分布的标准表示形式
马尔可夫随机场常用于图像分割、立体视觉和纹理建模
Markov random fields use undirected graphs to represent interactions between variables
Global, local, and pairwise Markov properties are equivalent in MRFs
MRFs define local probability distributions over cliques using potential functions
The Gibbs distribution is the standard representation for joint distributions in MRFs
Markov random fields are commonly used in image segmentation and stereo vision
条件随机场是给定输入序列条件下输出序列的条件概率分布模型
线性链条件随机场是最常用的CRF结构，适用于序列标注任务
与隐马尔可夫模型相比，条件随机场是判别式模型而非生成式模型
条件随机场的特征函数可以捕捉输入和输出之间的任意依赖关系
CRF广泛应用于命名实体识别、词性标注和中文分词等NLP任务
Conditional Random Fields model the conditional probability of output sequences given input sequences
Linear-chain CRFs are the most common structure for sequence labeling tasks
Unlike HMMs, CRFs are discriminative models rather than generative models
CRF feature functions can capture arbitrary dependencies between inputs and outputs
CRFs are widely used for named entity recognition, POS tagging, and Chinese word segmentation
变量消去是一种精确推断方法，通过逐步消去变量计算边缘概率
信念传播算法在树结构的概率图模型上能够精确计算边缘分布
和积算法是信念传播的一种形式，用于计算所有变量的边缘概率
最大积算法是信念传播的变体，用于寻找概率最大的联合赋值
聚类图信念传播和环状信念传播用于处理含有环的图结构
Variable elimination is an exact inference method that computes marginals by eliminating variables
Belief propagation computes exact marginals on tree-structured graphical models
The sum-product algorithm is a form of belief propagation for computing marginal probabilities
Max-product algorithm is a variant of belief propagation for finding MAP assignments
Cluster graph and loopy belief propagation handle graphs containing cycles
变分推断将推断问题转化为优化问题，通过最小化KL散度近似后验分布
平均场近似假设所有变量相互独立，是最简单的变分推断方法
MCMC采样通过构建马尔可夫链来从复杂分布中生成样本
吉布斯采样是一种特殊的MCMC方法，每次只采样一个变量而固定其他变量
Metropolis-Hastings算法通过提议分布和接受准则实现样本转移
Variational inference converts inference into optimization by minimizing KL divergence
Mean-field approximation assumes all variables are independent in variational inference
MCMC sampling generates samples from complex distributions by building Markov chains
Gibbs sampling is an MCMC method that samples one variable at a time while keeping others fixed
Metropolis-Hastings algorithm uses proposal distributions and acceptance criteria for sample transitions
最大熵模型在满足约束条件下选择熵最大的概率分布
最大熵原理认为在已知部分信息时应选择最不确定的分布
最大熵模型的特征函数将输入映射为二值或实值特征
最大熵模型通过特征期望值与经验期望值的匹配实现约束满足
最大熵模型与对数线性模型和指数族分布有密切联系
Maximum entropy models select the distribution with maximum entropy subject to constraints
The principle of maximum entropy chooses the most uncertain distribution given partial information
Feature functions in MaxEnt map inputs to binary or real-valued features
MaxEnt models satisfy constraints by matching feature expectations with empirical expectations
Maximum entropy models are closely related to log-linear models and exponential family distributions
LDA是一种三层贝叶斯模型，用于发现文档集合中的潜在主题
LDA假设文档由多个主题混合而成，每个主题是词上的概率分布
LDA中的狄利克雷先验用于建模文档-主题分布和主题-词分布
LDA的推断通常使用变分推断或吉布斯采样方法
LDA广泛应用于文本挖掘、信息检索和推荐系统中的主题发现
LDA is a three-level Bayesian model for discovering latent topics in document collections
LDA assumes documents are mixtures of topics where each topic is a distribution over words
Dirichlet priors in LDA model document-topic and topic-word distributions
Inference in LDA is typically performed using variational inference or Gibbs sampling
LDA is widely used for topic discovery in text mining, information retrieval, and recommendation systems
